name: Tree Top Piru
description: The Tree Top Piru (Bompton Tree Top Piru) is a Blood/Piru set formed in the 1970s on the west side of Compton, named after tree-themed streets (Acacia, Poplar, Maple, Spruce, Cedar, Elm). Has spread to Tennessee, Texas, Maryland, and Baltimore. Connected to rappers DJ Quik and YG. In 2007, Baltimore TTP leader Michelle Hebron was sentenced to 30 years for racketeering and murder. In Texas, member Javan Williams received life for two 2017 murders.
